items.name: ROBLOXIAN Damage Orb
items.description: Equip these and leave them by pressing 'Q' in your wake—they only do 20 hit points of damage to other players, but each time they hit an orb, you gain a 60% speed buff!

items.name: Penguin Potion
items.description: Waddle like a pro!

items.name: Seranok's Rocket Jumper
items.description: Aim at the ground to propel yourself into the air!  Also shoot rockets at people.

items.name: 4th of July Fireworks 2018
items.description: Celebrate the 4th with a BANG!

items.name: Tomahawk
items.description: Long distance danger - free of charge!

items.name: The Big One!
items.description: This is the grand finale of fireworks.  This doesn't load back up so be sure to save it for just the right moment!

items.name: Ice Staff
items.description: Click on a location within 64 studs of your character to create a large wall of ice. The ice is slippery and nigh impossible to climb. Use it to block off corridors and routes of escape!

items.name: Orinthian Sword and Shield
items.description: Slash enemies with your futuristic sword or stop them dead in their tracks with a shield bash!  Activate the shield bash stun with a right click to stun enemies for 2 seconds.  When enemies are stunned, you can do extra damage!

items.name: Fire Breathing Friend
items.description: Better be careful what you say around this guy, unless you want to end up extra crispy.

items.name: Sinister Korblox Wings
items.description: Soar above your enemies (and all of ROBLOX) to remind them you're always watching.

items.name: Intern Racing Chair 2014
items.description: 2014 interns race in style!  Ride this chair around and shoot rockets at your foes, all from the comfort of your ROBLOX office chair.

items.name: Racing Tractor
items.description: He traded tilling fields for chasing thrills!

items.name: Korblox: Berserker's Claymore
items.description:
Crafted using their corrupted magic, this claymore is as deadly as it is heavy. Handed down from generation to generation to the mightiest Korbloxian warriors, this legendary weapon was once wielded by Canavus himself. 

With its ability to double its strength in the blink of an eye, this weapon outmatches almost all weapons at close range. Only the mighty knight Xargas is said to have be able to hold his own against this claymore!

items.name: Speedy Snow Boots
items.description: Walking across the winter wonderland is a snap in these. Hit 'Shift' to use your super speed boost and leave snowy tracks behind you!

items.name: The Seventh Snake Spell
items.description: You gotta loosen your tongue for this and be prepared to spit a lot! Click to summon snakes who will do your bidding.

items.name: Donut Danger
items.description: These dangerous throwing donuts do 20 damage per hit. Do not stop throwing these donuts.

items.name: Explosive Spy Pen
items.description: This pen is certainly mightier than a sword!  Click twice and throw the pen for an explosive surprise.  Well it's not a surprise to you - you know it's an explosive spy pen.

items.name: Deep Space Raygun
items.description: The astronauts recovered this gun from a crater on an uninhabited planet. Was it lost? Or left there on purpose? Click to fire a rectangular projectile, sparks fly trailing behind as it soars through the sky toward its target.

items.name: Big Apple Launcher
items.description: Launch explosive apples at your foes.  In the city, you must fight to survive!

items.name: Wyldfang the Brave Companion
items.description: Now you're a two man wolf-pack.
